bullet_points: Load the dataset from the provided path.
Perform one-hot encoding on magnetic_ordering and phase, and ordinal encoding on crystal_system.
Standardize all continuous features (e.g., c_a_ratio, volume_per_atom, energy_above_hull, d_band_filling, en_difference, M_soc_proxy).
Save the processed dataframe (with missing dos_at_fermi values preserved) to a CSV file, ensuring the raw features required for KNN imputation (band_gap, M_val, X_period, phase) are included.
Calculate the median G_vrh per phase within the subset of 90 materials where elastic data is available.
Create the binary target is_robust (1 if G_vrh > median, 0 otherwise).
Perform Spearman rank correlation analysis between is_robust and key descriptors.
Generate a bar chart of Spearman correlation coefficients ranked by absolute value.
Generate pair-plots for specific feature pairs: d_band_filling vs. en_difference, dos_at_fermi vs. volume_per_atom, and M_soc_proxy vs. c_a_ratio, colored by is_robust.
Save the correlation matrix, bar chart, and pair-plots.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Target Definition and Exploratory Correlation Analysis

bullet_points: Construct a Pipeline that includes a KNNImputer for dos_at_fermi and a RandomForestClassifier.
Implement Repeated Stratified K-Fold Cross-Validation (5-fold, 10 repeats) to optimize hyperparameters (n_estimators, max_depth, min_samples_split) using AUPRC.
Ensure the KNNImputer is fit only on training folds within the cross-validation loop.
Re-fit the final model on the full 90-sample elastic dataset using the best hyperparameters.
Save the trained model, best hyperparameters, and the mean/std of AUPRC, ROC-AUC, and balanced accuracy to a results file.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Model Training and Handling Class Imbalance

bullet_points: Calculate Permutation Feature Importance on held-out cross-validation folds, averaging importance scores and calculating standard deviations across folds.
Generate a bar chart of feature importance with error bars.
Generate Partial Dependence Plots (PDPs) for d_band_filling, en_difference, and dos_at_fermi.
Save the importance rankings and PDP figures.
Predict the probability of is_robust for the 112 metastable candidates using the final model.
Produce a ranked probability table (CSV) including material_id, formula, metal, chalcogen, phase, energy_above_hull, and the predicted is_robust probability.

Generate a scatter plot of predicted is_robust probability versus energy_above_hull, colored by phase, with reference lines for the dual-filter thresholds (probability > 0.8, energy_above_hull < 0.05 eV/atom).
Save the table and the scatter plot.
Report all numerical cross-validation metrics (mean AUPRC, mean ROC-AUC, mean balanced accuracy with standard deviations).
Interpret the correlation analysis and top-ranked features from the permutation importance analysis.
Discuss the physical significance of the "mechanical viability" boundary, connecting d_band_filling and en_difference trends to known TMD chemistry.
Summarize the screening outcome, including the number and identities of candidates passing the dual filter.
Write the full Results section of the paper.
